data.title: TransAlta Corporation Announces Results of the 2026 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders and Election of all Directors
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 30, 2026, TransAlta Corporation (TSX: TA) (NYSE: TAC) conducted its Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. According to reports, the meeting saw a significant turnout with a total of 188,939,751 common shares represented by shareholders attending in person and by proxy. This figure accounted for approximately 63.55% of the company's total outstanding common shares.

data.title: TEAMSTERS CALIFORNIA CONDEMN RUSHED, RECKLESS DMV RULES ALLOWING DRIVERLESS TRUCKS
data.description: A statement from Teamsters California Co-Chairs Victor Mineros and Peter Finn addresses their commitment to advocating for quality employment opportunities and road safety. Released in Sacramento, Calif., on April 30, 2026, they discuss the recent regulations introduced by the California Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV) concerning heavy vehicles. The union asserts its dedication to fighting for fair wages and improved working conditions, emphasizing the importance of upholding safety standards on the roads in light of these new rules.

data.title: NOVONIX Divests Non-Core Business to Focus on Synthetic Graphite
data.description: NOVONIX has completed the sale of its NOVONIX Battery Technology Solutions Inc. division in Canada to its previous CEO as previously disclosed.

data.title: Jura Announces Adoption of Semi-Annual Reporting
data.description: Jura Energy Corporation, based in Calgary, Alberta, announced on April 30, 2026, its plans to implement the semi-annual reporting (SAR) pilot program. The company, referred to as Jura, intends to adopt the policies of this program while utilizing the exemptions offered under Coordinated Blanket Order 51-933, which allows for Semi-Annual Reporting for Certain Venture Issuers. This decision indicates a strategic move by Jura to enhance its reporting practices and align with regulatory requirements.
QANTAS WILL SUSPEND ITS SYDNEY–BENGALURU SERVICE FROM AUGUST, WITH OPERATIONS SET TO RESUME AT THE END OF OCTOBER.

QANTAS WILL CONTINUE TO REDEPLOY AIRCRAFT TO OPERATE ADDITIONAL FLIGHTS BETWEEN AUSTRALIA AND EUROPE — ADDING 2,000 WEEKLY SEATS — AND HAS EXTENDED ITS PERTH–ROME SERVICE THROUGH THE END OF OCTOBER, WHILE PARIS FLIGHTS WILL REVERT TO THREE RETURN SERVICES PER WEEK IN AUGUST.

QANTAS AND JETSTAR ARE EXTENDING THEIR SCHEDULE CHANGES INTO Q1 FY27, KEEPING THE GROUP'S 5 PERCENTAGE POINT CAPACITY REDUCTION IN PLACE THROUGH THE END OF SEPTEMBER, WITH INTERNATIONAL CAPACITY CUT BY A FURTHER 2 PERCENTAGE POINTS FOR Q1 FY27.

data.title: Atlantic Petroleum Posts Net Loss of DKK 3.8MM for 2025
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Tórshavn, Faroe Islands, P/F Atlantic Petroleum (NASDAQ OMX: ATLA DKK) released its Annual Results for the year 2025. It is important to review this company announcement alongside Atlantic Petroleum’s Consolidated Annual Report to gain a comprehensive understanding of the financial performance.

data.title: Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated Announces Increased First Quarter Dividend
data.description: Today, Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated (NYSE: CHCT) revealed an update regarding its common stock cash dividend for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors has approved an increase in the dividend payment to $0.48 per share. Shareholders are set to receive this payment in the upcoming period.

data.title: FIRSTFUND REPORTS 2025 FOURTH QUARTER RESULTS
data.description: Consolidated Firstfund Capital Corp. (TSXV: FFP) reported its financial results for the three months ending December 31, 2025, showing a net loss of $4,231 or $0.00 per share. This is an improvement from the same period in 2024, which saw a net loss of $72,015 or $0.01 per share. The company also recorded an unrealized net gain of $5,000 for the same period in 2025, compared to an unrealized net loss of $108,130 in 2024. This gain was from the revaluation of investments in Vitality Products Inc. (TSXV: VPI) measured at fair value through profit or loss. Fee income decreased slightly to $104,938 for the three months ending December 31, 2025, down from $105,228 in 2024. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Golden Corral® Accelerates Strategic Nationwide Growth with Six New Locations Underway
data.description: One of the top buffet brands in America, Golden Corral, has confirmed its dedication to expansion by offering flexible development opportunities and updated franchise benefits. Operating in the United States, Golden Corral is recognized for its affordable, family-oriented dining atmosphere. As of April 30, 2026, the company continues to strengthen its position as the largest buffet chain in the country.

data.title: Veeva Systems Set to Join S&P 500
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Veeva Systems Inc. (NYSE: VEEV) was announced to replace Coterra Energy Inc. (NYSE: CTRA) in the S&P 500. This change will be effective before trading opens on Thursday, May 7. Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN), a current member of the S&P 500, is in the process of acquiring Coterra Energy in a significant deal. The transition marks a notable shift within the S&P 500 index.

data.title: Black Diamond Reports First Quarter Results and Declares Dividend
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Black Diamond Group Limited unveiled its operational and financial performance for the first quarter of 2026, contrasting it with the same period in 2025. The company, traded as TSX: BDI, is a prominent supplier of space rentals and workforce lodging services. All monetary amounts discussed in the report are denominated in Canadian dollars.

data.title: /UPDATE -- Bullpen and HardScope Launches Market Bubble, Prediction Market Podcast Series, Hosted by Banks and Ansem/
data.description: HardScope has announced the launch of Market Bubble, a Prediction Market Podcast Series hosted by Banks and Ansem. The news was issued on 30-Apr-2026 via PR Newswire. The company has made changes to the release, providing additional details.
